title: Experiment Queue
description: Schema for queue.json used in overnight autonomous mode. Defines a batch of experiment variations to run sequentially with git-commit-per-experiment and keep/discard logic based on a primary metric.

queue_id.description: Unique identifier for this queue run (e.g., 'overnight_2026_03_15')

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this queue was created

metric_name.description: Name of the primary metric to use for keep/discard decisions

metric_direction.description: Whether higher or lower metric values indicate better performance

base_spec.description: Path to the base experiment spec JSON that each variation overrides

experiments.description: Ordered list of experiment variations to run

id.description: Unique identifier for this variation within the queue

description.description: Human-readable description of what this variation tests

overrides.description: Key-value overrides to apply on top of the base spec

seeds.description: List of random seeds to run this variation with (default: [42, 123, 456])

composite_metric.description: Optional weighted combination for non-scalar metric comparison. Keys are metric names, values are weights (must sum to 1.0).
